Default Prove-Up (Partition Action)
Off Calendar Dec-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Carla Amador & Sajja Ravinantapricha , CSR: Lavena Ward #7077 (Department 218)

Appearances
Plaintiff, Christopher Philippeos, is not present.
Attorney, David S. Rosenbaum, is present on behalf of the plaintiff.

Defendants, Thomas Philippeos, Steven Phillippeos, and Peter Philippeos are not present.
(Default was entered on 10/2/07 as to defendant Thomas Philippeos and Default was entered on 7/11/07 as to Steven Phillippeos and Peter Philippeos)

This cause came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing on a Partition Action. Christopher Philippeos' appearance is waived.

After hearing the testimony of counsel and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants, Thomas Philippeos, Steven Phillippeos, and Peter Philippeos, as follows:

Michael Kasolas is appointed as the referre with full power as described in the judgment. The Court retains jurisdiction of this matter. Please see judgment for full details. Judgment by Court submitted and signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up (Partition Action)
Off Calendar Nov-20-2007 Continued To Dec-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Patricia Abalos #13128 (Department 218)

Appearances
Plaintiff, Christopher Philippeos, is present.
Attorney, David S. Rosenbaum, is present on behalf of the plaintiff.

Defendants, Thomas Philippeos, Steven Phillippeos, and Peter Philippeos are not present.
(Default was entered on 10/2/07 as to defendant Thomas Philippeos and Default was entered on 7/11/07 as to Steven Phillippeos and Peter Philippeos).

This cause came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing on a Partition Action. Christopher Philippeos is sworn and examined by David S. Rosenbaum.

After hearing the testimony and considering the evidence presented by plaintiff, the Court continues the matter to December 11, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. to appoint a Referee and address the issue of the co-defendant's eviction. Plaintiff's appearance is waived on December 11, 2007, but he must submit a declaration re appointment of the Referee. Plaintiff's counsel is to submit a Brief on the issue of the co-defendant's eviction no later than December 6, 2007.
